verses.text: Fear the LORD and keep His commandments, that it be well. Fear God. Obedience brings life.
Fear the LORD and keep His commandments, that it be well. Fear God. Obedience brings life.
Fear the LORD and keep His commandments, that it be well. Fear God. Obedience brings life.
'Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God is one LORD... love the LORD' with all your heart. The Shema. Love God wholly.
'Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God is one LORD... love the LORD' with all your heart. The Shema. Love God wholly.
Teach these words to your children; bind them, write them. Teach. God's word fills the home.
Teach these words to your children; bind them, write them. Teach. God's word fills the home.
Teach these words to your children; bind them, write them. Teach. God's word fills the home.
Teach these words to your children; bind them, write them. Teach. God's word fills the home.
When full, beware lest you forget the LORD who brought you out. Beware. Plenty can breed forgetfulness.
When full, beware lest you forget the LORD who brought you out. Beware. Plenty can breed forgetfulness.
When full, beware lest you forget the LORD who brought you out. Beware. Plenty can breed forgetfulness.
Fear Him, serve Him, swear by His name; go not after other gods. Loyalty. He alone is God.
Fear Him, serve Him, swear by His name; go not after other gods. Loyalty. He alone is God.
Fear Him, serve Him, swear by His name; go not after other gods. Loyalty. He alone is God.
Tempt not the LORD, but keep His commandments. Trust. Do what is right in His sight.
Tempt not the LORD, but keep His commandments. Trust. Do what is right in His sight.
Tempt not the LORD, but keep His commandments. Trust. Do what is right in His sight.
Tempt not the LORD, but keep His commandments. Trust. Do what is right in His sight.
When your son asks the meaning, tell him of Egypt. The question. Children should ask and learn.
When your son asks the meaning, tell him of Egypt. The question. Children should ask and learn.

God brought us out to bring us in and do us good. Tell. The story keeps faith alive.
